In January 2017, Jabhat Fath al-Sham attacked Jabhat Ahl al-Sham bases in Atarib and other towns in western Aleppo, capturing all bases by 23 January. By 24 January 2017, Jabhat Ahl al-Sham was defeated and joined Ahrar al-Sham. This interaction indicates a coercive merger rather than an alliance or structural link, as the joining occurred after military defeat. No other interactions are documented, so the relationship is limited to this single event.
